title: Create Style Interface
body:
![a](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a13cfd4a75d62d3359010c4ba4520b8a998010c4.png)


![b](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d12e216f99a4599c879ac7098bce29d93ecf25fc.png)

This is a small resource pack focused on customizing the Minecraft GUI.


⬇️ Mods Supports:

✅ AppleSkin Mod Support.
✅Create Mod Support.
✅ Cosmetic Armor Reworked Mod Support.
✅ Corpse Mod Support.
✅ Curios Mod Support.
✅ Extreme Sound Muffler Mod Support.
✅ Cosmetic Armor Reworked Mod Support.
✅ Farmers Delight Mod Support.
✅ Overflowingbars Mod Support.
✅ JEI Mod Support.
✅ Sophisticated Backpacks/Storage Mod Support.
✅ Toms Storage Mod Support.
✅ Farmers Delight Mod Support.
✅ Forbidden Arcanus Mod Support.
✅ Inventory Tweaks Mod Support.
✅Waystone Mod Support.
✅ Crafting tweaks Mod Support.




✅ Created in the style of the Create Mod, bringing a clean, mechanical, and immersive feel to your HUD.


A unique visual touch to elevate your Minecraft experience!
